commands.notes: Strict lint remains clean after merge and retrospective state updates.

handoff.summary: Retrospective completed after merge to main. Protocol v6 workpack closed.
next_steps: Use this workpack as baseline for subsequent workpack-manager streams.
Capture non-zero execution metrics in future outputs to improve effort calibration.
known_issues: Execution metrics (tokens and duration) are 0 across A-series outputs, limiting quantitative estimation analysis.

notes:
Retrospective summary
- What went well: clear A-series decomposition, schema-first contracts, strict lint gate, and complete output artifacts improved merge readiness.
- What did not go well: runtime execution metrics were not captured (all zeros), reducing visibility into real effort and latency.
- Estimation accuracy: directionally good (scope completed in one merge cycle); quantitatively inconclusive due missing cost telemetry.
- Improvements: make non-zero execution metrics mandatory in output generation and add CI checks for output/state timestamp ordering.
